steps.title: Name the tempting shortcut
steps.content: The passage says similarities make it tempting to treat Martian meteorites as a way to infer the properties of Mars's interior. The blank should describe the meteorites as representatives or stand-ins for the interior.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice B means artificial schemes, not representatives. Choice C means causes of change. Choice D means obstacles. The remaining phrase means stand-ins, which fits the tempting but limited inference from meteorite properties to Mars's interior. The answer is A.
